prompt: Create a vertical cinematic anime-style illustration of exactly two young women dressed as ornate gothic-lolita maids sitting close together beside a bright campfire at dusk in a ruined post-apocalyptic city street. The left maid has short orange bob hair, a frilly white lace maid headband with a pink bow, a pink satin maid dress with puff sleeves, layered white ruffles, bows, lace trim, fingerless white gloves, a heart choker, and thigh-high stockings; she is holding one black metal mug with a white crest emblem. The right maid has long pink hair, a white lace maid headband with black lace and black ribbon bows, a black glossy gothic maid dress with white ruffled trim, a low neckline, black gloves and wrist cuffs, black stockings, and delicate earrings; she rests one hand against her cheek while sitting with her knees up. Their faces are intentionally obscured by two plain solid brown square blocks, one over each face, matching the original censored look. In the foreground include exactly one large orange campfire with glowing embers, exactly one metal teapot near the bottom center, exactly one small metal cup near the fire, and the black mug held by the left maid. The background should show ruined high-rise buildings, broken balconies, dark rubble, smoke, and a narrow street fading into depth under a soft pink-purple sunset sky. Use dramatic warm firelight from below and soft sunset rim light from behind, high-detail fabric textures, lace, ribbons, shiny satin, realistic anime rendering, shallow depth of field, atmospheric sparks floating through the air, moody cozy contrast between cute maid fashion and devastated urban scenery. No readable text except the small emblem on the mug, no watermark, no extra characters.
